name: Banana
description: Cargo volume with rear seats flat — the Bjørn Nyland banana box test

name: Weight
description: Curb weight distribution across the EV segment

name: Noise
description: Interior noise levels at highway speeds

name: 1000 km
description: 1 000 km challenge — average speed including charging stops

name: 500 km
description: 500 km challenge — average speed including charging stops

name: Geilo
description: A mountain route challenge from Oslo to Geilo — a steep, cold-weather drive through Norwegian highlands. Measures total time and number of charging stops. Fewer stops and lower time means better real-world mountain performance.

name: Degradation
description: Battery capacity degradation vs. odometer reading

name: Arctic Circle
description: A ~950 km route from southern Norway to the Arctic Circle and back. Each car drives the full route including all charging stops. The key metric is average speed (km/h) — higher means faster charging and better real-world long-distance capability.

name: Bangkok
description: Energy consumption test driven in Bangkok's extreme heat (35°C+) with heavy A/C use. Measures Wh/km — lower is better. Shows how well each car handles tropical conditions where cabin cooling is a major energy drain.
